name: AMALA P ANTY
clean_text:
AMALA P ANTY
Data Analyst | Data Scientist | NLP & Conversational AI Specialist
Bangalore, Karnataka, India • +91 9037394914 • amalaanty@gmail.com
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Results-driven Data Scientist and Data Analyst with 3.5+ years of experience in NLP, machine learning, and conversational AI
for large-scale BFSI clients. Proven expertise in building and validating ML models, designing knowledge graphs (ontology)
,performing statistical analysis, Automation using Jenkins and delivering data-driven insights to optimize operational
efficiency. Proficient in Python, SQL, Scikit-learn, and data visualization tools. Strong domain knowledge in banking and
financial services with a track record of measurable performance improvements. Seeking to leverage a strong ML, NLP, and
data analytics foundation in Data Analyst or Data Scientist roles.
CORE TECHNICAL SKILLS
Programming & DB Python, SQL, Regex
ML & AI Supervised Learning, Unsupervised Learning, Classification, Regression, PCA, XGBoost,
Feature Engineering, Hyperparameter Tuning,Model Evaluation Metrics such as Confusion
Matrix, Classification Report(Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1), Streamlit
Deep Learning & NLP ANN, CNN, RNN, Intent Classification, NER, Dialog Management, FAQ Modeling, LLM
Response Validation, Chatbot Training, Sentiment Analysis
Frameworks & Libs Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, Keras, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn
Data Analytics EDA, Statistical Analysis, Advanced Excel, Pivot Tables, Data Wrangling, Data Cleaning
Tools & Platforms Git, Jenkins, Postman, Jira, Sublime Text, Google Translate, Triniti
Environments Jupyter Notebook, Visual Studio Code, Google Colab
Domain Banking & Financial Services (BFSI), Finacle, Saksham 360,Artificial Intelligence(Chatbots)
MACHINE LEARNING PROJECTS
E-Commerce Customer Churn Prediction | Supervised Learning | Classification
 Built an XGBoost classifier to predict customer churn with 92.09% accuracy using Python and scikit-learn.
 Performed feature engineering, missing value treatment, and GridSearchCV-based hyperparameter tuning.
 Evaluated model with Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and F1-Score to optimize for business-critical false-negative reduction.
 Deployed as an interactive Streamlit web app with real-time prediction
Brain Tumor Detection using CNN | Deep Learning | Image Classification
 Developed a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to classify MRI brain scans as tumor-positive or tumor-negative using
TensorFlow and Keras.
 Applied image preprocessing, data augmentation, and transfer learning by using cnn architecture MobileNetV2 to
improve model generalization and robustness.
 Evaluated model performance using Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and F1-Score; achieved high classification accuracy on
the test dataset.
 Built an end-to-end inference pipeline deployable via a Streamlit web application for real-time predictions.
Titanic Survival Prediction | Supervised Learning | Classification
• Developed a binary classification model using XGBoost with feature engineering and hyperparameter tuning,
achieving 80.09% accuracy on test data and deployed as an interactive Streamlit web app with real-time prediction
Credit Card Customer Segmentation | Unsupervised Learning | Clustering
 Segmented customers using KMeans Clustering and PCA for dimensionality reduction; visualized cluster profiles with
Matplotlib and Seaborn to derive actionable insights.
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Data Engineer II | Gupshup Technologies India Pvt. Ltd.|Jul 2021 – Dec 2024
Clients: ICICI Bank | Canara Bank | Standard Chartered Bank | Tata Capital | Tonik
Chatbot Training & NLP Model Development
 Analyzed banking FAQs (account balance, EMI, loan tenure, card dues, transaction history) and built high-accuracy NLP
training datasets for end-to-end chatbot deployment.
 Identified and corrected intent mismatches in bot responses; iteratively retrained models to achieve 100% accuracy on
targeted use cases.
 Validated and scored LLM/ChatGPT-generated responses (correct/incorrect/invalid) to enhance model precision for
production environments.
 Developed utterances for 20+ banking use cases (credit card cancellation, loan balance, etc.) and authored NER, Dialog,
and Smalltalk configuration files.
Knowledge Graph & Ontology Management
 Designed and maintained base Knowledge Graphs for Retail Banking (India/US) and Corporate Banking generic projects
from scratch.
 Structured product-attribute data across account, loan, card, deposit, and investment domains; performed FAQ
fulfillment analysis and ontology updates aligned to new intents and FAQs.
 Conducted admin validation, sanity testing, and QA handover for all completed knowledge graph projects.
Chat Log Analysis & Accuracy Improvement
 Executed Python scripts to generate chat log validation reports; classified utterances by intent (FAQ, small talk,
transaction, query, gibberish).
 Identified gaps, recommended new FAQs, prepared structured V4-format training data, and incorporated customer
feedback for accuracy improvement loops.
Multilingual Data Validation & Curation
 Curated, updated, and deduplicated FAQ datasets for ICICI Bank, Tata Capital, and Standard Chartered Bank.
 Validated multilingual translations using Google Translate and Triniti; performed manual word-level reviews and
compiled data for translation engine fine-tuning.
 Tracked issues via Jira and maintained validation trackers across multiple concurrent client projects.
Automation & CI/CD Pipeline
 Automated chatbot training and regression testing via Jenkins; generated pivot table reports for each automation cycle.
 Resolved automation defects across FAQ, PC, NER, Dialog, and Smalltalk components; designed POC data (text/image
generation) and committed finalized training data to Git.
Deputy Manager – Banking Operations | Axis Bank| Oct 2020 – Nov 2021
 Managed end-to-end banking operations: deposits, payments, NEFT/RTGS transfers, cheque clearing, and end-of-day
reconciliation.
 Processed service requests including loan closures, re-KYC updates, debit card issuance, FD receipts, and locker
operations.
 Investigated and resolved ATM/debit/credit card fraud escalations; monitored transactions for suspicious activity.
 Cross-sold fixed deposits, insurance, mutual funds, and loans; drove combined FD and insurance sales exceeding Rs. 3
crores.
 Conducted onboarding training for new joiners on Finacle, Saksham 360, and core banking payment procedures.
Deputy Manager – Home Loans | ICICI Bank| Oct 2019 – Nov 2020
 Assessed applicants' financial status through bank statements, credit reports, and document verification to determine
home loan eligibility.
 Guided customers through loan selection, application, and approval; consistently achieved monthly disbursement targets
of Rs. 1.5 crores.
 Managed loan portfolios including part payments, foreclosure, rate conversions, EMI, and loan closure across home,
personal, and auto loan products.
 Cross-sold credit cards, mutual funds, personal loans, and fixed deposits; secured FD bookings of Rs. 2 crores (FY 2018-
2019), earning Top Performer recognition.
EDUCATION
MBA – Finance & Marketing 2016 – 2018
Rajagiri College of Social Sciences (Autonomous), RCBS | 70%
BBA – Business Administration 2013 – 2016
Rajagiri College of Management and Applied Sciences, RCMAS | 84%
KEY ACHIEVEMENTS
 Received Client Appreciation for educating stakeholders on Knowledge Graph architecture and chatbot testing at
Gupshup Technologies.
 Consistently achieved monthly home loan disbursement target of Rs. 1.5 crores at ICICI Bank.
 Awarded Top Performer at ICICI Bank for securing Rs. 2 crores in fixed deposits during FY 2018-2019.
 Drove insurance and fixed deposit sales exceeding Rs. 3 crores at Axis Bank.
 Earned repeated client commendations for proactive follow-ups and timely execution of critical banking activities.
I hereby declare that all information furnished above is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge.
